title: Claw Patrol Security firewall for agents
abstract: Imagine your computer as an old castle, vulnerable to cyberattacks at any moment. Not anymore! Claw Patrol Security Firewall is here to protect you like a private guard on constant duty, alerting you the second something suspicious happens. Say goodbye to privacy breaches and malware infections. Give it a try and let Claw Patrol keep watch with you!
abstract_zh: 你是不是觉得自己的电脑就像一个破旧的城堡，随时可能被黑客攻陷？那可不行！Claw Patrol 安全防火墙来帮你啦！它就像是你的私人守卫，全天候监控，一有风吹草动就立刻提醒你。再也不用担心隐私泄露和病毒入侵了！来试试吧，让Claw Patrol 陪你一起守护这片天地！
